neighborhoods.name: Downtown / River Market
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized riverfront with farmers market, Clinton Presidential Library, and growing restaurant scene

housing.predominantType: Loft apartments, condos, and converted buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Little Rock. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Little Rock

neighborhoods.name: West Little Rock / Chenal
neighborhoods.description: Affluent western area with Chenal Valley development, shopping, and country club living
neighborhoods.character: Affluent western, golf and shopping, newer

housing.predominantType: Newer single-family homes and country club properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Little Rock's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Little Rock

neighborhoods.name: North Little Rock / Jacksonville
neighborhoods.description: North side communities with military base influence, affordable housing, and river access

housing.predominantType: Ranch houses, affordable homes, and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Little Rock

neighborhoods.name: Hillcrest / The Heights
neighborhoods.description: Historic neighborhoods with walkable dining, boutique shopping, and strong community identity
neighborhoods.character: Historic walkable, dining scene, community identity

housing.predominantType: Craftsman bungalows, historic homes, and renovated houses

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Little Rock
